projectDescription: Portable distribution of Obsidian markdown note-taking app for Windows with PortableApps.com launcher
keyFeatures: Portable Obsidian installation that runs from USB drives or cloud folders
PortableApps.com launcher integration for seamless portability
Automatic path management for vault locations across different drives
No local installation required - run from any Windows PC
Preserves all settings and data between different computers
publicApiSurface: --user-data-dir command-line argument for data directory control
App/AppInfo/appinfo.ini - Application metadata and version information
Data/ObsidianAppData - Portable data directory for settings and vaults
